title: Add "subitem board" to context
excerpt:

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Right now, the “context” for an integration block allows you to select the board and user for the integration recipe to be sent. You can choose the trigger board for if a subitem triggers it.

If the “subitem board” was added to the context, we’d be able to chose that to send the subitem boardId in the action payload, or use it as a dependency for other fields.
